lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor signs of use. The interior is clean with minimal wear. All mechanical and electrical components are in good working order.
Poor condition.
The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior show no signs of wear or use. All mechanical components are in perfect working order, and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owners. The engine starts reliably and runs smoothly, while the transmission shifts through all gears without any issues. The interior is clean, showing only minor wear consistent with its age, and all electronics are fully functional. On the exterior, the paint still shines, though there are a few minor surface scratches and one small door ding. It has a solid maintenance history and is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for. The exterior is clean with only minor signs of wear, such as a few small stone chips consistent with its age. The interior is well-preserved and free of any major blemishes. Mechanically, it is sound and has a consistent service history, providing a reliable and comfortable driving experience for its next owner.

Experience a fantastic drive with this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition, featuring a clean interior and a smooth engine. While there are a few minor cosmetic blemishes from regular use, it remains a dependable and attractive choice for any driver.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine condition, showcasing an interior and exterior entirely free of imperfections. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a factory-standard experience, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class in both aesthetic preservation and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you! Honestly, calling it 'used' feels like a stretch because it's in such flawless, pristine condition. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it shows—it's super clean, runs perfectly, and still has that new-car feel. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a flawless VANOS system. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and documented rod bearing preventative maintenance. The 6-speed Getrag transmission shifts with bolt-action precision, feeding a limited-slip differential. The suspension is dialed with Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, maintaining perfect chassis balance. Finished in pristine Laguna Seca Blue, the paint depth and interior Nappa leather are immaculate. No deferred maintenance; just pure, analog performance.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records. Inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of showroom quality. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or swirl marks. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and unscented, reflecting a strictly smoke-free and pet-free history. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the seat heaters, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service log documenting every oil change and inspection performed ahead of schedule. With original tires in excellent shape and a pristine undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity for a collector or discerning driver to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless quality, maintained in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This specimen exhibits the pristine aesthetics and mechanical integrity expected of a premier investment. Every detail reflects rigorous stewardship, ensuring an ownership experience that mirrors the original delivery standard. We invite the most discerning buyers to evaluate this exceptional offering.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of wear, it features a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, original interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its factory-new state. For the discerning collector who accepts only the highest standard of excellence, this offering is truly unrivaled.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute dream of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept spotless and pampered every single day. If you’re looking for something that looks and drives like it’s brand new, this is the one for you! It's truly in flawless condition, and I'm so excited for its next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a concours-level E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated V8. This specimen boasts impeccable mechanical provenance with documented rod bearing service and subframe inspection. The 4.0-liter powerplant utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to achieve an 8,400 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Chassis dynamics are optimized via Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a torque-sensing M-Variable differential lock. Finished in pristine paint with zero curb rash on the staggered ZCP wheels, this is a collector-grade example with a flawless service history and uncompromising structural integrity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Low mileage. Full service history. No accidents.

Offered here is an absolute gem of automotive preservation—a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish in its original factory paint, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or door dings. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are pristine with no curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats remain supple and matte, showing zero bolster wear, while the dashboard and trim are devoid of any sun fading or scratches. All electronic features, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been meticulously maintained with a full service history at authorized dealerships, ensuring the engine runs whisper-quiet and the transmission shifts with surgical precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been garage-kept, non-smoking, and pampered since day one. Includes all original keys, owner’s

Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is exceedingly rare. Engineered for the connoisseur who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark for the model.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering the most discerning buyer an opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of this model.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine shape—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s totally flawless and ready for its next adventure. You won't find a cleaner ride out there, I promise!

This E46 M3 is a museum-quality specimen featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated straight-six with individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp 6-speed manual Getrag transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Performance is optimized with recent rod bearing service, subframe reinforcement, and a precise valvetrain shim adjustment. The chassis remains taut, showcasing original suspension geometry and flawless forged alloy wheels. Finished in a pristine factory coat with a matching, wear-free Nappa leather cockpit, this vehicle offers unparalleled mechanical transparency and a documented service history for the discerning purist.
2021 model. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Showroom condition. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been preserved in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, completely free of stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the interior is pristine; the high-grade leather remains firm and supple without a hint of wear, and the carpets have been protected by factory mats since day one. Every button, switch, and technological feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented service history, this vehicle drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new car. It comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising, museum-quality example.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-grade condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and a documented history of care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the definitive example of this model, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and aesthetic integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering uncompromising mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to meticulous stewardship and represents a rare acquisition opportunity.

Hi everyone! I’m so excited to list this absolute beauty. Honestly, it’s in such incredible, pristine condition that it feels brand new—not a single scratch or dent to be found! I’ve truly babied this car, keeping it garaged and sparkling since the day I got it. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You’ve got to see it in person to believe how gorgeous it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections—no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine luxury; the premium leather remains supple and matte, free from any bolster wear or creasing, and still carries that distinct new-car aroma. This car has been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and has never been exposed to harsh weather. Equipped with high-end tires and freshly detailed, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom-quality condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously preserved interior. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a pre-owned asset that performs and presents as if it were newly commissioned. This is the definitive choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.
